TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Will_Allen, title = Will_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Will_Allen} }

S.FORM: Will Allen siwkay niza nalecuhan niza i 2 a bulad 8 a demiad, 1949 a mihca, Will Allen, u miunduay nu kawaw niza. tatama ku etul, lumeniay ku banges. Will Allen nalecuhan i Rockville, Maryland, United States, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput.
S.PHON: wir~…ær~…æ ar~…ær~…æ…ôn siwkaj niza nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan niza i * a bur~…æad * a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, wir~…ær~…æ ar~…ær~…æ…ôn, u miunduaj nu kawaw niza. tatama ku …ôtur~…æ, r~…æum…ôniaj ku ba≈ã…ôs. wir~…ær~…æ ar~…ær~…æ…ôn nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i *o ¶k*ir~…ær~…æ…ô, marjr~…æand, unit…ôd stat…ôs, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput.
S.FORM: Will Allen siwkay niza nalecuhan niza i 2 a bulad 8 a demiad, 1949 a mihca, Will Allen, u miunduay nu kawaw niza. tatama ku etul, lumeniay ku banges. Will Allen nalecuhan i Rockville, Maryland, United States, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput.
